steps.title: Use the zero product property
steps.content: A product equals zero when at least one factor equals zero.

steps.title: Find the solutions
steps.content: Set each factor equal to zero: $x+2=0$ gives $x=-2$, $x-5=0$ gives $x=5$, and $x+9=0$ gives $x=-9$.

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: The only positive solution is $5$, which matches C.
